rationale: Adds a bare empty catch block around the new check_dependencies invocation: `try { const missing = await invoke<string[]>("check_dependencies"); ... } catch {}`. The error-swallow detector correctly fired at block severity (Phase 1.5 specifically kept blocking this pattern because it is the cheat shape, distinct from the comment-explained pattern downgraded to info). The PR was closed without merge by the reviewer. The empty catch obscures failures of the new Tauri command without surfacing them to the user — the very behavior the detector exists to prevent. This is a true-positive for error-swallow: external evidence (rejected by reviewer) anchors the broken verdict to a fact outside this project's opinion.
